EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISurface

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control surfaces.

[Guid("73B80FBC-FF33-11D1-A549-0000F8774F0F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISurface : IFunctionalSurface

Properties

CanDoCurvature

Indicates if earth curvature can be applied.

bool CanDoCurvature { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

Domain 

IPolygon Domain { get; }

IPolygon

Z[double, double] 

double Z[double X, double Y] { get; }

Parameters

X double
Y double

Property Value

double

ZFactor

Multiplication factor applied to all z values to provide unit-congruency between coordinate components.

double ZFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

QueryPixelBlock(double, double, double, double, esriRasterizationType, object, object)

Derives slope, aspect, hillshade, or elevation from the input surface and writes the result to the provided PixelBlock.

void QueryPixelBlock(double xOrigin, double yOrigin, double xPixelSize, double yPixelSize, esriRasterizationType Type, object valueForNoData, object block)

Parameters

xOrigin double
yOrigin double
xPixelSize double
yPixelSize double
Type esriRasterizationType
valueForNoData object
